Terminal-Bench.description: Measures the agent's ability to compile, link, execute, and inspect terminal output lines without syntax or execution crashes.

SWE-bench-Verified.description: Measures the agent's ability to resolve codebase failures, handle strict compiler hardening (-Werror), and prevent unit test regressions.
SWE-bench-Verified.metric: Unit Test Regression Suite Pass Rate

MCP-Atlas.description: Measures the roundtrip overhead and execution latency of filesystem tool calls and subprocess dispatches managed by the agent harness.

LiveCodeBench.description: Measures compilation validity, static code analysis warnings, and adherence to strict project formatting rules under full optimization compiles.
